skeptic.top_risk: Karma collapses into a second activity counter, gameable by mutual-boosting/alts, so it adds a leaderboard without adding a distinct signal.
skeptic.cheapest_evidence: Instrument grants ~2-4 weeks; measure rank correlation karma vs XP plus share of karma in small reciprocal clusters.

builder.top_risk: Peer-granted karma collapses into a second activity/social-clique counter, gameable by mutual-boosting and alts, so it duplicates XP instead of measuring a distinct 'appreciation' axis.
builder.cheapest_evidence: Minimal !karma grant + separate leaderboard behind a config flag on one live server, then correlate karma rank vs XP rank after ~2 weeks.

user_value.top_risk: Karma collapses into a second activity counter (proxy for XP + social clique size) rather than an orthogonal 'appreciation' axis.
user_value.cheapest_evidence: Time-boxed shadow pilot in one server: log grants, compute karma-vs-XP rank correlation, eyeball grant graph for reciprocity; no leaderboard UI needed to test the core claim.

synth.top_risk: Karma collapses into a second activity counter - gameable by mutual-boosting, reciprocal cliques, and alts - duplicating XP instead of measuring a distinct appreciation axis.
synth.cheapest_evidence: Config-flagged single-server pilot: log every grant, then measure karma-vs-XP rank correlation plus the share of karma flowing inside small reciprocal clusters - low correlation + low clustering is the load-bearing signal it's distinct.
synth.report: Panel synthesis: all three HOLD (0.68/0.6/0.6), no dissent on direction, only on how much to build for the test; synthesized 0.66. Core claim semantic (third orthogonal axis). Strongest failure unanimous: distinctness collapse reinforced by gameability (mutual-boosting/reciprocal clusters/sybil); secondary thin engagement if reputational, merge into coins if spendable; anti-abuse layer is the real unresolved cost. Falsification: instrument one live server ~2-4 weeks, (a) rank correlation karma vs XP, (b) reciprocal-cluster concentration; run instrument-first, gate leaderboard behind passing the test. Asymmetry: cheap to ship, expensive to make trustworthy, worthless if untrusted. Smallest slice: +karma command behind config flag on single server, no self-grant/hard rate limit/per-pair cooldown/account-age gate, purely reputational, no leaderboard UI yet, every grant logged.
